electricity too are employed, but this is secondary and
should not be the main object of the native.
Luxuries and Conveyances.—If the lord of the 4th
house is strong and is aspected by or conjoined with a
benefic, the person will have at his command vehicular
facilities. Saturn, the lord of the 4th, is not only aspected by
benefic Jupiter but is also conjoined with Venus, another
benefic. Mercury another benefic is in the 4th. Another
peculiar combination which confers vehicular facilities is
present. If the lord of the 11th house reckoned from the lord
of the 9th be in the Navamsa of the Atma-karaka planet,
then also the native will be able to command vehicles. Here
the lord of the 9th is Mercury and he is in Capricorn, the
eleventh from which falls in Scorpio. The lord Mars is in
Virgo which is also the Karakamsa. Hence this yoga is
present. It can even be said that as all the principal benefics
